title: lotus unifoliolatus
intro: Lotus unifoliolatus, also known as Lotus australis, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lotus unifoliolatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Lotus unifoliolatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
